ideas.name: insert-idea-graph-into-readme
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: Reads IPM graph via idea show and replaces marker comments in Markdown files with Mermaid diagrams — keeps README graphs always in sync with the package database.

ideas.name: cjson
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: Ultralightweight JSON parser in C — used for structured output formatting when generating graph data for Markdown injection.

ideas.name: ipm
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: Idea Package Manager — provides the graph query tool that this package calls to generate Markdown diagrams from the database.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Uses cJSON to parse graph output from idea show and format structured data for Markdown injection into README files.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Calls idea show --md to query the IPM graph database and generate Mermaid diagrams that replace marker comments in documentation files.

program_edges.author: Vehir
program_edges.description: Links cJSON library for structured JSON output formatting when generating Mermaid diagrams from IPM graph data.

program_edges.author: Vehir
program_edges.description: Calls ipm show --md binary to query the IPM graph database and obtain Mermaid markup for injection into Markdown files.
